Deploy the application

Command Flags:

  --name : Deployment name
    type : string
    required : true

  --verbose : Enable verbose logging
    type : bool
    default : false
    currentvalue (set by appdefault) : false

  Cache:

  --cache-ttl : Cache TTL in seconds
    type : int
    default : 300
    currentvalue (set by appdefault) : 300

  --redis-url : Redis connection URL
    type : string
    default : redis://localhost:6379
    currentvalue (set by appdefault) : redis://localhost:6379

  Database:

  --db-host : Database host
    type : string
    default : localhost
    currentvalue (set by appdefault) : localhost

  --db-name : Database name
    type : string
    required : true

  --db-port : Database port
    type : int
    default : 5432
    currentvalue (set by appdefault) : 5432

  Scaling:

  --regions : Regions to deploy to
    type : []string

  --replicas : Number of replicas
    type : int
    default : 1
    currentvalue (set by appdefault) : 1

Global Flags:

  --color : Use ANSI colors
    type : string
    choices : [true false auto]
    default : auto
    envvars : [WARG_COLOR]
    currentvalue (set by appdefault) : auto

  --help , -h : Print help
    type : string
    choices : [allcommands compact default detailed outline]
    default : default
    currentvalue (set by passedflag) : detailed

  --term-width : Terminal width. Should be a positive integer, "auto", or "infinite". If "auto" the app will attempt to detect terminal width and fall back to 120 if detection fails
    type : string
    default : auto
    envvars : [WARG_TERM_WIDTH]
    currentvalue (set by appdefault) : auto

  Observability:

  --log-format : Log output format
    type : string
    choices : [text json]
    default : text
    currentvalue (set by appdefault) : text

  --log-level : Log level
    type : string
    choices : [debug info warn error]
    default : info
    currentvalue (set by appdefault) : info

  --trace : Enable tracing
    type : bool
    default : false
    currentvalue (set by appdefault) : false
